name: AirPods (3rd Generation) Case with Clip - heyday™ Poppy Flowers
description:
The Apple AirPods (3rd Generation) Case with Clip from heyday™ Poppy Flowers adds a botanical vibe to your accessories. Made from durable material, this case is compatible with wireless charging and includes a flip cover for easy access. The attached carabiner offers convenient portability, allowing you to clip it to bags or belts. Designed specifically for Apple AirPods (3rd generation, 2021), it combines style and functionality in an instant.

heyday™: Let your style speak volumes.
